name: Performance Anxiety
text: Give to the Alison Blaire player. You may flip to alter-ego form. You cannot use your Songwriter ability or use the Hero Action on Live Concert. Action: Exhaust your identity and discard a support or upgrade you control → remove this obligation from the game.

flavor:
(Dazzler's nemesis minion).
"Morality is the first step toward cowardice. And your cowardice has doomed you!" - Klaw
name: Klaw
text: Villainous. Forced Response: After Klaw attacks and damages a character, stun that character.

name: Solid Sound Body
text: Hinder 1 [per_hero]. Klaw gets +10 hit points. (When this scheme is defeated, Klaw loses those hit points.) When Defeated: Give Klaw a facedown boost card.

name: Stealing Sound
text: When Revealed: Discard all [[SONG]] events from Dazzler's Setlist. If no cards were discarded this way, this card gains surge.

name: Taunting Light
text: When Revealed: If you are Dazzler, the villain attacks you. If no attack was made this way, give the villain a facedown boost card and shuffle this card into the encounter deck.
